behavior.name: ReadSensitiveSystemFile
behavior.description: Attempts to read a sensitive system file (`/etc/passwd`), likely for user account enumeration or initial reconnaissance.

behavior.name: DiscoverEnvironmentVariables
behavior.description: Attempts to read process environment variables (`/proc/self/environ`), which may contain sensitive information like API keys or credentials.

behavior.name: InternalNetworkConnectionAttempt
behavior.description: Initiates an outbound network connection to a private IP address (192.168.10.55) on port 80, which could indicate lateral movement, internal reconnaissance, or an attempt to establish internal command and control.

behavior.name: RemoteCodeExecutionViaShell
behavior.description: Executes a shell command to download and immediately execute a script from a remote, potentially malicious, domain (evil.com), indicating a dropper or ingress tool transfer for further compromise.

technique.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: Unix Shell
